recentWork.title: Free Developer CLI — LLM Comparison from Terminal
recentWork.summary: Built core CLI (packages/cli): compare, models, info, providers commands. 20 models, 7 providers. Styled tables. Telemetry opt-in. Conversion CTA. CI workflow for model data updates.
